calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-09-2005 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-08-2005 Continued To Jul-11-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: MICHAEL ROSSOFF FOR PLAINTIFF AMBASSADOR HOTEL SRO ASSOCIATES
LESLIE CANCEL FOR DEFENDANT JIMEL HARTZFIELD

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF TO RECOVER POSSESSION WITH A STAY OF EXECUTION FOR 6 MONTHS. DEFENDANT TO REFRAIN FROM BEHAVIOR DEEMED AS A NUISANCE UNDER LAW; ENROLL IN AN ANGER MANAGEMENT CLASS AT OSHUN CENTER; MEET WITH SOCIAL WORKER - 2 - 1/2HOUR SESSIONS EACH MONTH.
PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE NEUTRAL REFERENCE IN WRITING IF NECESSARY AND ALL PARTIES WAIVE ALL CLAIMS. IF DEFENDANT BREACHES AGREEMENT, PLAINTIFF SHALL SEEK RELIEF BY EXPARTE APPLICATION TO COURT WITH A 5 DAY NOTICE TO DEFENDANT AND DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL OF RECORD.
PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE DECLARATION SETTING FORTH SPECIFICS OF BREACH. ALL PARTIES AGREE.
IF SETTLEMENT SUCCESSFUL, PLAINTIFF WILL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE.

JUDGE PRO TEM:GUY STILSON; CLERK: BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER: GENA EALES (218)

MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-08-2005 Text Ruling
